question: Universal Containers plans to enhance the customer support team's productivity using AI. Which specific use case necessitates the use of Prompt Builder?
options: Creating a draft of a support bulletin post for new product patches.
Estimating support ticket volume based on historical data and seasonal trends.
Creating an AI-generated customer support agent performance score.
explanation: Prompt Builder es necesario para generar borradores de contenido con AI.

question: An administrator wants to check the response of the Flex prompt template they've built, but the preview button is greyed out. What is the reason for this?
options: The prompt has not been saved and activated.
The records related to the prompt have not been selected.
A merge field has not been inserted in the prompt.
explanation: In Prompt Builder, the preview button remains greyed out until the administrator selects the specific records related to the prompt to evaluate the merge fields and generate the preview.

question: After a successful implementation of Agentforce Sales Agent with sales users, Universal Containers now aims to deploy it to the service team. Which key consideration should the Agentforce Specialist keep in mind for this deployment?
options: Assign the Agentforce for Service permission to the Service Cloud users.
Assign the standard service actions to Agentforce Service Agent.
Review and test standard and custom Agent topics and actions for Service Center use cases.
explanation: Al desplegar el agente al equipo de servicio, la consideracion clave es revisar y probar los topics y acciones estandar y personalizados para los casos de uso del Service Center. Los topics y acciones disenados para ventas pueden no ser apropiados o suficientes para los flujos de trabajo de servicio.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) tiene como beneficio clave proporcionar un marco estandarizado que permite a los agentes de diferentes proveedores descubrirse y comunicarse entre sí de forma segura, facilitando la interoperabilidad entre distintos ecosistemas de IA.

question:
Universal Containers wants to use an external large language model (LLM) in Prompt Builder.
What should an AI Specialist recommend?
options: Use Apex to connect to an external LLM and ground the prompt.
Use BYO-LLM functionality in Einstein Studio,
Use Flow and External Services to bring data from an external LLM.
explanation: Para utilizar un modelo LLM externo (como los de OpenAI, Anthropic o modelos propios) en Prompt Builder, se debe usar la funcionalidad Bring Your Own LLM (BYO-LLM) a través de Einstein Studio Model Builder.

question: An Agentforce Specialist needs to create a prompt template to fill a custom field named Latest Opportunities Summary on the Account object with information from the three most recently opened opportunities. How should the Agentforce Specialist gather the necessary data for the prompt template?
options: Select the Account Opportunity object as a resource when creating the prompt template.
Create a flow to retrieve the opportunity information.
Use formula fields to reference the Einstein related list of opportunities.
explanation: A Template-Triggered Prompt Flow should be created to explicitly fetch, sort by opened date, and limit the opportunities to the three most recent ones. This provides the granular querying needed, which is not natively supported by simply selecting the related list resource.

question: An Agentforce Specialist builds a new Service Agent that uses a custom action built on a flow. The agent has been tested in a sandbox and is now ready to deploy. What is a key consideration regarding the activation status of the agent in the production environment?
options: The agent will be activated automatically only if the flow is also active.
The agent must be manually activated in production, regardless of its status in the sandbox.
The agent will automatically be activated upon successful deployment.
explanation: Los agentes deben activarse manualmente en produccion independientemente de su estado en el sandbox. El despliegue no activa automaticamente el agente; el Agentforce Specialist debe ir a produccion y activarlo explicitamente despues del despliegue exitoso.

question: Universal Containers is building a digital shopping assistant that needs to dynamically generate product recommendations using information from the company's external product recommendation predictive model through APIs. Which Agentforce capability should make it easier for the agent to consume the external product recommendation tool?
options: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Hugging Face
Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol
explanation: Model Context Protocol (MCP) es la capacidad de Agentforce que permite al agente descubrir y consumir dinamicamente herramientas y APIs externas, como un modelo predictivo de recomendaciones de productos. MCP facilita la integracion con herramientas externas de forma estandarizada sin necesidad de codificacion custom.

question: What is an AI Specialist able to do when the “Enrich event logs with conversation data" setting in Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is enabled?
options: View the user click path that led to each Agentforce or copilot  action.
View session data including user Input and Agentforce or copilot  responses for sessions over the past 7 days.
Generate details reports on all Agentforce or copilot  conversations over any time period.
explanation: Al habilitar 'Enrich event logs with conversation data', el especialista puede ver los datos de sesión incluyendo inputs del usuario y respuestas del agente de los últimos 7 días. No se puede ver el click path completo del usuario ni generar informes históricos ilimitados con esta configuración.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked with creating a prompt template for a sales team. The template needs to generate a summary of all related opportunities for a given Account. Which grounding technique should the Agentforce Specialist use to include data from the related list of opportunities in the prompt template?
options: Use formula fields to reference the related list.
Use merge fields to reference the default related list of opportunities.
Use merge fields to reference a custom related list.
explanation: Use merge fields para referenciar el related list predeterminado de oportunidades.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers (UC) is tasked with creating a new custom prompt template to populate a field with generated output. UC enabled the Einstein Trust Layer to ensure AI Audit data is captured and monitored for adoption and possible enhancements.
Which prompt template type should the AI Specialist use and which consideration should they review?
options: Flex, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Forms is enabled
explanation: Para poblar un campo específico con contenido generado por IA en una página de registro, se debe usar una plantilla de 'Field Generation'. Además, es requisito indispensable que la página de registro esté configurada usando Dynamic Forms.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to make a marketing newsletter and to directly use data from five unrelated objects (two standard and three custom) ina prompt template. How should UC accomplish this?
options: Create a prompt template-triggered flow to access the data from five objects.
Create a prompt template passing in a special custom object.
Create a flex template and use the five objects as inputs.
explanation: Flex prompt templates allow you to define up to 5 distinct inputs (standard or custom objects), making it the most direct and appropriate way to incorporate data from five unrelated objects without requiring a custom Flow.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts (CCR) uses Agentforce to assist customers with booking and service issues. CCR wants to implement a triage process so that: • High severity requests must be escalated to a human service rep. • Lower severity requests should result in creating a support case for the guest. • The requirement is to achieve the highest reliability and determinism in the response from the agent. Which approach should an Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Write the triage and routing logic in Topic Instructions using an IF, THEN, ELSE pattern: "Escalate to human service rep if the request is considered severe, otherwise create support case".
Use absolute keywords like "Always" and "Never" in Topic Instructions to enforce logic, such as "Always escalate when severity is high" and "Never create a support case when severity is high".

Create a custom variable severityLevel populated by a Triage action. Add filters so the "Escalate to human service rep" action only runs when severityLevel = 'High', and the "Create Support Case" action runs only when severityLevel != 'High'
explanation: Para maxima fiabilidad y determinismo, se deben usar variables personalizadas con filtros condicionales en las acciones. Las instrucciones en Topic Instructions dependen del LLM para seguirlas, lo que no es deterministico. Los filtros condicionales en acciones son el unico mecanismo que garantiza ejecucion determinista independientemente del LLM.

question: A customer service representative Is looking at a custom object that stores travel information. They recently received a weather alert and now need to cancel flights for the customers that are related with this itinerary. The representative needs to review the Knowledge articles about canceling and rebooking the customer flights. Which Agentforce capability helps the representative accomplish this?
options: Invoke a flow which makes a call to external data to create a Knowledge article.
Generate a Knowledge article based off the prompts that the agent enters to create steps to cancel flights.
Execute tasks based on available actions, answering questions using information from accessible Knowledge articles.
explanation: La capacidad de Copilot/Agentforce para asistir a los representantes incluye ejecutar tareas de forma autónoma (como cancelar vuelos) basándose en las acciones disponibles y responder preguntas extrayendo información de los artículos de Knowledge accesibles mediante Generación Aumentada por Recuperación (RAG). Esto empodera al agente humano para resolver el caso de manera integral.

question:
An AI Specialist has created a Agentforce or copilot  custom action using flow as the reference action type. However, it is not delivering the expected results to the conversation preview, and therefore needs troubleshooting.
What should the AI Specialist do to identify the root cause of the problem?
options: In Agentforce or copilot  Builder within the Dynamic Panel, turn on dynamic debugging to show the inputs and outputs.
In Agentforce or copilot  Builder within the Dynamic Panel, confirm selected action and observe the values in Input and Output sections.
In Agentforce or copilot  Builder, verify the utterance entered by the user and review session event logs for debug information.
explanation: The new answer is correct because the best practice for troubleshooting an action based on a Flow in Copilot Builder is to turn on dynamic debugging in the Dynamic Panel to observe inputs and outputs. The original answer (verifying utterances and reviewing session event logs) is incorrect because it relies on standard event logs which do not offer the real-time, granular input/output visibility for Flow actions that the Dynamic Panel's debugging tool provides.

question: A Salesforce Administrator wants to generate personalized, targeted emails that incorporate customer interaction data. The admin wants to leverage large language models (LLMs) to write the emails, and wants to reuse templates for different products and customers. Which solution approach should the admin leverage?
options: Create a Sales Email prompt template type.
Use Sales Email standard templates.
Create a Field Generation prompt template type.
explanation: Crear plantilla de prompt de Sales Email reutilizable para diferentes clientes.

question:
An AI Specialist built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. 
What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
explanation: Los errores de token limit son aleatorios porque el número de tokens generados varía según el contenido dinámico del registro procesado; algunos registros tienen más datos que otros. El template no es el problema ni la demanda del LLM; es la variabilidad inherente de los datos de cada registro.

question: Universal Containers has a custom Agent action calling a flow to retrieve the real-time status of an order from the order fulfillment system. What should the Agentforce Specialist consider about the running user's data access?
options: The flow must have the 'with sharing' permission selected in the advanced settings for the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings to be respected.

The custom action adheres to the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings configured in the flow. The Agent will always run flows in system mode so the running user's data access will not affect the data returned.
explanation: Para que se respeten los permisos, FLS y sharing rules del usuario en ejecucion, el flow invocado debe estar configurado para ejecutarse con 'With Sharing' (User Context). La opcion marcada previamente es incorrecta porque los agentes no ejecutan siempre los flows en system mode; el contexto de ejecucion depende de la configuracion del propio flow.

question: Coral Cloud Resorts wants to handle frequent customer misspellings of package names in queries. Which approach should the Agentforce Specialist implement?
options: Hybrid search
Vector search
Keyword search
explanation: The original answer included 'Keyword search', which is incorrect because keyword search relies on exact literal matches and completely fails on misspellings. The correct approach is Hybrid search, which leverages the semantic capabilities of vector embeddings to understand misspellings while combining it with keyword search for optimal overall results.

question: Universal Containers has a new AI project. What should an Agentforce Specialist consider when adding a related list on the Account object to be used in the prompt template?
options: After selecting a related list from the Account, use the field picker to choose merge fields in Prompt Builder.
Prompt Builder must be used to assign the fields from the related list as a JSON format.
The fields for the related list are based on the default page layout of the Account for the current user.
explanation: Al agregar una related list del objeto Account en un prompt template, los campos disponibles como merge fields estan basados en el page layout predeterminado del Account para el usuario actual. Si el campo no esta en el page layout, no aparecera como opcion de merge field en Prompt Builder.

question: What is the role of the large language model (LLM) in executing an Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action?
options: Find similar requests and provide actions that need to be executed
Identify the best matching actions and correct order of execution
Determine a user's access and sort actions by priority to be executed
explanation: El LLM identifica las acciones más relevantes y el orden óptimo de ejecución para satisfacer la solicitud del usuario. No busca solicitudes similares ni determina permisos de acceso; su rol es la planificación y selección inteligente de acciones.

question: Universal Containers needs its sales reps to be able to only execute prompt templates, not create or manage them. Which permission set should be assigned?
options: Prompt Template Manager permission set.
Prompt Template User permission set.
Einstein Generative AI User permission set.
explanation: Prompt Template User es el permission set que permite unicamente ejecutar prompt templates existentes, sin capacidad de crear ni administrar nuevos templates. Es la opcion correcta cuando solo se necesita acceso de ejecucion.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: The original answer incorrectly claimed the A2A protocol is for 'internal' agent discovery. The correct answer is that the key benefit of the A2A protocol is providing a standardized framework for 'cross-vendor' agent discovery and communication, allowing Salesforce agents to collaborate seamlessly with third-party external agents.

question: An Agentforce Specialist needs to create a prompt template that extracts the customer's name, phone number, and case number from a block of text, and nothing else. How should the Agentforce Specialist structure the prompt to ensure the large language model (LLM) doesn't include extra conversation or text?
options: Ask the LLM to extract and only output the important information in the text.
Use well-defined output instructions and provide desired output examples.
Ensure in the prompt that the LLM has been told to only use name value pairs in the response.
explanation: Para asegurar que el LLM extraiga solo la información específica (nombre, teléfono, número de caso) sin agregar texto conversacional adicional, la mejor práctica de ingeniería de prompts es proporcionar instrucciones de salida bien definidas y ejemplos del formato esperado (few-shot prompting). Esto guía al modelo para generar la respuesta exactamente con la estructura solicitada, limitando cualquier texto adicional.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to deploy an Agentforce Service Agent to support customers via a web experience. UC uses a Digital Experience site and wants to enable messaging for logged-in users. The customer needs to pass the membership number to the agent for which a pre-chat variable is available. What is a required step to connect the agent to the Digital Experience site using Messaging for In-App and Web?
options: Configure a messaging Lightning web component using standard or custom Lightning Type for Agentforce.
Create an Omni-Channel flow that routes messages to the agent.
Configure MuleSoft to establish a secure API tunnel between the agent and the Digital Experience site.
explanation: Para conectar un Service Agent a un sitio de Digital Experience usando Messaging for In-App and Web, se debe crear un flujo de Omni-Channel que enrute los mensajes al agente. Este flujo gestiona el enrutamiento y permite pasar variables pre-chat como el numero de membresia.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has configured a data library and wants to restrict indexing of knowledge articles to articles which are only publicly available in their knowledge base. UC also wants the agent to link sources that the large language model (LLM) grounded its response on. Which settings should help UC with this?
options: In the data library setting window, under Knowledge Settings, enable Use Public Knowledge Article and select Show sources.
In the data library setting window, under Knowledge Settings, enable Use Public Knowledge Article. It is not possible to display articles that the LLM grounded its response in.
Use Data Categories to categorize publicly available articles to index. Sources are automatically displayed when knowledge articles are categorized as Public.
explanation: En la configuracion de la Data Library, bajo Knowledge Settings, se puede habilitar 'Use Public Knowledge Article' para restringir la indexacion a articulos publicos, y 'Show sources' para que el agente enlace las fuentes en las que el LLM baso su respuesta.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to use Generative AI Salesforce functionality to reduce Service Agent handling time by providing recommended replies based on the existing Knowledge articles. On which AI capability should UC train the service agents?
options: Service Replies
Case Replies
Knowledge Replies
explanation: Knowledge Replies es la capacidad de IA que proporciona respuestas recomendadas basadas en articulos de Knowledge existentes, reduciendo el tiempo de manejo de los agentes. Service Replies es un termino diferente y Case Replies no existe como feature estandar de Salesforce.

question: Universal Containers needs to bring individual customer warranties from an external system into Data Cloud. They want Agentforce to return warranty-related responses only for accounts whose warranty status is active. Which search approach should the Agentforce Specialist configure?
options: Depend on Agentforce instructions to enforce warranty constraints and include only WarrantyStatus = Active results.
Store the account's warranty status in an Agentforce custom variable to dynamically filter warranties during retrieval.
Use Hybrid Search and apply pre-filtering in a new custom retriever for matching accounts where the WarrantyStatus = Active field.
explanation: Usar Hybrid Search con pre-filtering en un retriever personalizado para WarrantyStatus = Active garantiza que solo se recuperen garantias activas de forma determinista. Depender de instrucciones del agente no es suficientemente confiable para filtros de negocio criticos.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to implement a solution in Salesforce with a custom UX that allows users to enter a sales order number. Subsequently, the system will invoke a custom prompt template to create and display a summary of the sales order header and sales order details. Which approach should UC use?
options: Create a Lightning Web Component that calls the prompt template via Apex.
Create a screen flow to collect the sales order number and invoke the prompt template using the standard Prompt Template flow action.
Use an Autolaunched Flow triggered by a record update to invoke the prompt template.
explanation: Crear un Screen Flow que recolecte el numero de orden y luego invoque el prompt template usando la accion estandar de flow Prompt Template es el enfoque correcto. Esto permite una UX personalizada sin necesidad de codigo Apex y aprovecha las capacidades nativas de Salesforce.

question: What is the primary function of the reasoning engine in Agentforce?
options: Generating record queries based on conversation history
Identifying agent topics and actions to respond to user utterances
Offering real-time natural language responses during conversations
explanation: El reasoning engine identifica topics y acciones adecuados para una utterance.

question: A Service Agent at Universal Containers is designed to help customers resolve issues by searching against knowledge articles. Knowledge articles have PDF attachments that add critical details. UC reports that the agent provides excellent summaries of the knowledge articles, but seems completely unaware of the PDF attachments. How should an Agentforce Specialist configure the Data Cloud search index to include the content of these attached files?
options: Increase article chunk size and token limits for Knowledge indexing so larger contexts capture attachment references.
Enable 'Include Related Attachments' for Knowledge--kav and map the ContentDocumentLink unstructured data model object (UDMO).
Use Data Cloud's 'Include Attachments' option and select the ContentDocumentVersion unstructured data model object (UDMO).
explanation: Para incluir el contenido de archivos PDF adjuntos a articulos de Knowledge en el search index, se debe usar la opcion 'Include Attachments' de Data Cloud y seleccionar el UDMO ContentDocumentVersion, que representa las versiones de documentos adjuntos y permite indexar su contenido para busqueda semantica.

question: Universal Containers wants to keep retrieval accurate as product documentation changes frequently. Which approach should the company implement?
options: Leave embedding unchanged even if content is updated.
Rebuild the search index.
Manually delete the stale data chunks.
explanation: Para mantener la precision del retrieval cuando la documentacion cambia frecuentemente, se debe reconstruir el search index. Esto regenera los embeddings vectoriales con el contenido actualizado, asegurando que las busquedas semanticas reflejen la informacion mas reciente.

question: Which best practice should UC follow to grant access to this information for the Agentforce Service Agent?
options: Update the Object and Field access in the Einstein Agent User Profile so that the Agentforce Service Agents will always get the necessary access.
Update the Object and Field access in the AgentforceServiceAgentUserPsg permission set group that is already assigned to the Agentforce Service Agent user.
Create a new permission set with the Einstein Agent License and enable Read access to the custom fields and custom objects, and assign it to the Agentforce Service Agent user.
explanation: En Salesforce, no es posible modificar directamente los permisos de objetos y campos en un Permission Set Group. La mejor práctica y la forma técnicamente viable de otorgar acceso a objetos y campos personalizados al Agentforce Service Agent es crear un nuevo Permission Set (Conjunto de permisos), asignarle los permisos necesarios, y luego asignar dicho conjunto de permisos al usuario del Agente.

question: What considerations should an Agentforce Specialist be aware of when using Record Snapshots grounding in a prompt template?
options: Activities such as tasks and events are excluded.
Email addresses associated with the object are excluded.
Empty data, such as fields without values or sections without limits, is filtered out.
explanation: Record Snapshots filtra datos vacíos y solo incluye campos con valores. Esto asegura que el grounding sea relevante y sin ruido para el modelo generativo.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is creating a prompt template to assist support reps in drafting responses to customer complaints. To ensure the responses are empathetic and helpful, what is a key element to include in the prompt template?
options: direct instruction to the large language model (LLM) to role-play as a character
list of keywords related to customer complaints
The entire history of the customer's previous interactions with the company
explanation: Una técnica fundamental en la creación de prompts es el 'Role-Playing' (asumir un personaje). Al dar una instrucción directa al LLM para que actúe como un representante empático y servicial, la IA adoptará dicho tono y estilo en la redacción de sus respuestas, asegurando una alta calidad y humanización al gestionar las quejas y preocupaciones de los clientes.

question:
A data scientist needs to view and manage models in Einstein Studio. The data scientist also needs to create prompt templates in Prompt Builder.
Which permission sets should an AI Specialist assign to the data scientist?
options: Data Cloud Admin and Prompt Template Manager
Prompt Template Manager and Prompt Template User
Prompt Template User and Data Cloud Admin
explanation: Data Cloud Admin permite ver y gestionar modelos en Einstein Studio, mientras que Prompt Template Manager permite crear y administrar prompt templates en Prompt Builder. Estos dos permission sets juntos cubren ambos requisitos del data scientist.

question: Support agents at Universal Containers are using Agentforce to find troubleshooting information. They've reported that the agent frequently provides knowledge articles that are outdated, even when newer versions of the articles are available. The administrator has confirmed that all articles are correctly chunked and indexed. Which configuration change in the Data Cloud hybrid search index best addresses this problem?
options: Disable the keyword index to rely solely on the vector index.
Switch the chunking strategy from section-aware to fixed-size.
Add a ranking factor for recency based on the LastModifiedDate field.
explanation: Para resolver el problema de recuperación de artículos antiguos que aún pueden ser semánticamente relevantes, la acción recomendada es configurar un factor de clasificación (ranking factor) en Data Cloud para priorizar los registros basándose en el campo 'LastModifiedDate'. Así, los documentos con fechas de modificación más recientes recibirán una puntuación superior, asegurando que el agente consuma el conocimiento más actualizado disponible.

question: Universal Containers (UC) users are complaining that agent answers are not satisfactory. The agent is using PDF files as a knowledge source. How should UC troubleshoot this issue?
options: Verify the retriever's filter criteria and data source connection.
Check that the agent has the PDF file field permission access for the data library.
Analyze the data mapping between source fields and Data Cloud object fields.
explanation: Si las respuestas del agente basadas en PDFs (Data Library) no son satisfactorias, el primer paso para solucionar el problema es verificar los criterios de filtrado del retriever y la conexión de la fuente de datos. Un retriever mal configurado (con filtros demasiado restrictivos o amplios) o una desconexión con la fuente de datos impedirán que el agente recupere el contexto adecuado, generando respuestas pobres o genéricas.

question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers is working on a prompt template to generate personalized emails for product demonstration requests from customers. It is important for the Al-generated email to adhere strictly to the guidelines, using only associated opportunity information, and to encourage the recipient to take the desired action.
How should the AI Specialist include these instructions on a new line in the prompt template?
options: Surround them with triple quotes (""").
Make sure merged fields are defined.
Use curly brackets {} to encapsulate instructions.
explanation: Para incluir instrucciones adicionales o directrices estrictas en una plantilla de prompt y asegurar que el modelo las distinga del resto del contenido, las mejores prácticas de Prompt Engineering recomiendan encapsularlas entre comillas triples (""").

question: Leadership needs to populate a dynamic form field with a summary or description created by a large language model (LLM) to facilitate more productive conversations with customers. Leadership also wants to keep a human in the loop. Which prompt template type should the Agentforce Specialist recommend?
options: Field Generation
Record Summary
Sales Email
explanation: Field Generation prompt templates are designed exactly for populating a specific field. They include human-in-the-loop natively by requiring the user to click the sparkle icon on the dynamic form field to review and accept the generated text.

question: When is the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol an appropriate communication choice?
options: When agents need to invoke third-party APIs
When agents need to access tools
When agents need to collaborate
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) es apropiado cuando los agentes necesitan colaborar entre si, delegando tareas o compartiendo contexto. Para invocar APIs de terceros se usa MCP, y para acceder a herramientas tambien se usa MCP. A2A es especificamente para colaboracion y comunicacion entre agentes.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) tiene como beneficio clave proporcionar un marco estandarizado que permite a los agentes de diferentes proveedores descubrirse y comunicarse entre sí de forma segura, facilitando la interoperabilidad entre distintos ecosistemas de IA.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to ensure its compliance team can retrieve exact matches of policy clause numbers from a structured legal document library. Which search type should UC implement?
options: Use hybrid search to blend keyword and semantic recall.
Use keyword search for exact term matching on structured fields like clause numbers.
Use semantic search to interpret synonyms of clauses dynamically.
explanation: Dado que el requisito principal es recuperar coincidencias exactas de números de cláusula en documentos estructurados, la búsqueda por palabras clave (keyword search) es la solución óptima. A diferencia de la búsqueda vectorial (semántica), que evalúa el significado e intención, la búsqueda por palabra clave asegura que un identificador alfanumérico se encuentre de manera literal y precisa en el índice.

question: When configuring a prompt template, an Agentforce Specialist previews the results of the prompt template they've written. They see two distinct text outputs: Resolution and Response. What does this mean?
options: It shows the response from the LLM based on the sample record.
It shows the raw prompt sent to the LLM and the model's response separately.
It indicates an error in the template configuration that needs to be resolved.
explanation: In Prompt Builder, 'Resolution' refers to the fully resolved prompt text, with all merge fields and grounding data populated, which is then sent to the LLM. 'Response' is the output generated by the LLM. The original answer was incorrect because it only described the response portion and failed to explain the 'Resolution' output, which represents the raw, resolved prompt.

question: Universal Containers’ Agent Action includes several Apex classes for the new Agentforce Agent. What is an important consideration when deploying Apex that is invoked by an Agent Action?
options: Apex classes invoked by an Agent Action may be deployed with less than 75% test coverage as long as the agent is not activated in production.
The Apex classes must have at least 75% code coverage from unit tests, and all dependencies must be in the deployment package.
The Apex classes may bypass the 75% code coverage requirement as long as they are only used by the agent.
explanation: Apex invocado por Agent Action requiere 75% cobertura y todas las dependencias en despliegue.

question:
Universal Containers needs a tool that can analyze voice and video call records to provide insights on competitor mentions, coaching opportunities, and other key information. The goal is to enhance the team's performance by identifying areas for improvement and competitive intelligence.
Which feature provides insights about competitor mentions and coaching opportunities?
options: Call Summaries
Einstein Sales Insights
Call Explorer
explanation: Call Explorer (parte de Einstein Conversation Insights) permite a los gerentes de ventas consultar e interactuar con el análisis de llamadas de voz y video, descubriendo menciones a la competencia e identificando oportunidades de coaching.

question: An administrator at Universal Containers has successfully deployed a new agent from a sandbox to production using a change set. The agent uses a prompt template that invokes a Salesforce flow to perform a complex calculation. In production, when users interact with the agent, it fails with an error message every time the flow is supposed to run. The flow was included in the change set and is present in production. What is the most likely cause of this issue?
options: The change set did not include the dependent Apex classes for the flow.
The flow was not manually activated in the production org after the deployment.
The user in production does not have permission to run the flow.
explanation: Por regla general en Salesforce, cuando se despliega un flujo mediante Change Sets hacia un entorno de Producción, este se implementa en estado inactivo por razones de seguridad. Como consecuencia, si el agente invoca una plantilla que llama a este flujo, el proceso fallará irremediablemente hasta que el administrador ingrese a Producción y lo active de forma manual.

question:
Before activating a custom Agentforce or copilot  action, an AI Specialist would like to understand multiple real-world user utterances to ensure the action is being selected appropriately.
Which tool should the AI Specialist recommend?
options: Model Playground
Einstein Agentforce or copilot
Agentforce or copilot  Builder
explanation: Agentforce Builder es la herramienta correcta para entender múltiples utterances reales del usuario y verificar que las acciones personalizadas se seleccionan apropiadamente. Model Playground es para probar el modelo en general y Einstein Agentforce es la plataforma completa, no una herramienta de testing específica.

question: In Model Playground, which hyperparameters of an existing Salesforce-enabled foundational model can an AI Specialist change?
options: Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Top-k sampling, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Output Tokens
explanation: En el Model Playground, los Especialistas en IA pueden ajustar hiperparámetros clave como la Temperatura (Temperature), la Penalización de Frecuencia (Frequency Penalty) y la Penalización de Presencia (Presence Penalty) para afinar el comportamiento del modelo.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) recently rolled out Einstein Generative Al capabilities and has created a custom prompt to summarize case records. Users have reported that the case summaries generated are not returning the appropriate information.
What is a possible explanation for the poor prompt performance?
options: The data being used for grounding Is incorrect or incomplete.
The prompt template version is incompatible with the chosen LLM.
The Einstein Trust Layer is incorrectly configured.
explanation: Una explicación posible para el bajo rendimiento del prompt (resúmenes que no devuelven la información adecuada) es que los datos utilizados para el grounding sean incorrectos o estén incompletos, lo que lleva al modelo a generar respuestas inexactas basadas en contexto defectuoso.

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to troubleshoot an agent that is hallucinating weblinks. The agent has an action that uses a prompt template, which is using a knowledge retriever, to generate the output text. Which process is appropriate to find the root cause of the hallucination behavior?
options: Examine the topic name and classification description for hallucination guardrails.
Examine the prompt instructions and contents of the chunks shown in the resolved prompt output.
Examine the topic instructions and ensure the word 'ALWAYS' is used in the hallucination guardrails.
explanation: Para encontrar la causa raiz de alucinaciones de weblinks, se deben examinar las instrucciones del prompt y el contenido de los chunks mostrados en el output del prompt resuelto. Los chunks revelan que datos exactos se estan usando para grounding, lo que permite identificar si el contenido fuente contiene links incorrectos o si el LLM los esta inventando.

question:
An AI Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client.
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
explanation: Para integrar un LLM personalizado fine-tuneado en OpenAI a Salesforce de forma segura, se debe usar Einstein Studio Model Builder para registrar y gestionar el modelo externo. Hacer callouts directos a OpenAI o incrustar con iFrame no proporciona las garantías de seguridad y control del Trust Layer.

question: An Agentforce Service Agent, who has been successfully assisting customers with service requests in Salesforce, is now unable to help customers with issues related to a new product replacement process. The company recently implemented a custom Product Replacement object. Which change must be implemented?
options: The profile assigned to the Agentforce Agent User needs AI training permission to the custom object.
The permission set assigned to the Agent User needs Read access to the custom object.
The permission set group assigned to the Agent User needs to grant access to the Product Replacement flow.
explanation: Para que el agente pueda consultar el objeto custom de reemplazo de producto, el permission set debe incluir acceso Read a ese objeto.

question: Which use case is best supported by Salesforce Einstein Agentforce or copilot 's capabilities?
options: Bring together a conversational interface for interacting with AI for all Salesforce users, such as developers and ecommerce retailers.
Enable Salesforce admin users to create and train custom large language models (LLMs) using CRM data.
Enable data scientists to train predictive AI models with historical CRM data using built-in machine learning capabilities.
explanation: El caso de uso mejor soportado por Agentforce (o Einstein Copilot) es proporcionar una interfaz conversacional integrada para interactuar con la IA a todos los usuarios de Salesforce. Esto permite a los usuarios hacer preguntas y ejecutar tareas usando lenguaje natural directamente en su flujo de trabajo.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has a library of custom-built personalized investment portfolio APIs, and is planning to extend it to agents. Which method should UC's agent choose to dynamically use the best API service?
options: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol support
Model Context Protocol (MCP) server support
MuleSoft connector for custom hosted processes
explanation: Para integrar una biblioteca de APIs personalizadas existentes, la forma recomendada en Agentforce es utilizar acciones basadas en MuleSoft. MuleSoft permite a los agentes de Agentforce conectarse de forma segura a servicios externos, orquestar múltiples APIs y ejecutar procesos alojados externamente, extendiendo las capacidades del agente hacia sistemas de terceros.

question: For an Agentforce Data Library that contains uploaded files, what occurs once it is created and configured?
options: The files are stored in Salesforce Files and indexed on demand.
Indexes the uploaded files into Data Cloud.
The files are vectorized and stored in an external vector database.
explanation: Una vez que se crea y configura una Data Library con archivos subidos, Salesforce indexa automaticamente esos archivos en Data Cloud, creando los vectores y el search index necesarios para que el retriever pueda realizar busquedas semanticas sobre el contenido.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is experimenting with using public Generative AI models and is familiar with the language required to get the information it needs. However, it can be time consuming for both UC's sales and service reps to type in the prompt to get the information they need, and ensure prompt consistency.
Which Salesforce feature should a Salesforce AI Specialist recommend to address these concerns?
options: Einstein Recommendation Builder
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action: Query Records
Einstein Prompt Builder and Prompt Templates
explanation: Einstein Prompt Builder con Prompt Templates es la solución para estandarizar y reutilizar prompts complejos, evitando que los usuarios tengan que escribirlos manualmente cada vez. Esto garantiza consistencia en los prompts y ahorra tiempo a los equipos de ventas y servicio.

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a prompt template to fill a custom field named Latest Opportunities Summary on the Account object with information from the three most recently opened opportunities.
How should the AI Specialist gather the necessary data for the prompt template?
options: Create a flow to retrieve the opportunity information.
Select the Account Opportunity object as a resource when creating the prompt template.
Select the latest Opportunities related list as a merge field.
explanation: The new answer is correct because an autolaunched flow allows for complex logic, such as sorting and limiting the returned records (e.g., retrieving exactly the three most recently opened opportunities) to pass into the prompt template. The original answer was incorrect because simply selecting the Opportunity object as a resource does not provide the capability to restrict and sort the related records to just the top three.

question: Universal Containers is rolling out a new generative AI initiative. Which Prompt Builder limitations should the Agentforce Specialist be aware of?
options: Rich text area fields are only supported in Flex template types.
Creations or updates to the prompt templates are not recorded in the Setup Audit Trail.
Custom objects are supported only for Flex template types.
explanation: Una limitacion importante de Prompt Builder es que las creaciones y actualizaciones de prompt templates no se registran en el Setup Audit Trail de Salesforce. Esto es relevante para organizaciones con requisitos estrictos de auditoria de cambios de configuracion.

question: What should an AI Specialist consider when using related list merge fields in a prompt template associated with an Account object in Prompt Builder?
options: The Activities related list on the Account object Is not supported because it is a polymorphic field.
If person accounts have been enabled, merge fields will not be available for the Account object.
Prompt generation will yield no response when there is no related list associated with an Account in runtime.
explanation: Prompt Builder has limitations with polymorphic fields. The Activities related list (Tasks and Events) on the Account object is polymorphic and is not supported as a direct merge field for grounding.
